description: 15m Supertrend entry with 1H Supertrend directional confirmation
signal_logic: Enter LONG when 15m ST flips bullish AND 1H ST is bullish. Enter SHORT when 15m ST flips bearish AND 1H ST is bearish. Close position when 15m ST flips but 1H disagrees.

position_sizing.reason: Fixed sizing avoids compounding death spiral. Compounding loses money due to asymmetric position sizing after drawdowns.

order_execution.expected_maker_fill_rate: ~100% (close-to-open gap is essentially zero on 15m BTC)

filters.volume: disabled for deployment (marginal improvement, adds complexity)

known_risks: Strategy loses money in ranging markets (ADX < 20). 35% of bars are ranging.
Early starts (2024) see 67-79% max drawdown before recovering.
Only 35.5% win rate — long losing streaks are expected and normal.
52-day cross-exchange validation shows some trade divergence (31 vs 29 trades).
No live trade history to validate against — paper trader is essential.
Compounding DESTROYS this strategy. Never switch to % of equity sizing.
deployment_checklist: 1. Run paper trader for 30 days minimum
2. Compare paper results to backtest predictions
3. If paper P&L is within 50% of backtest prediction, proceed to live
5. Use limit orders with 15s timeout, market fallback
